brief: US strikes on Iran escalate, while Telstra outages disrupt emergency calls in Australia; and a Senate candidate withdraws amid rape allegations. Meanwhile, research explores performance incentives in visualization and clinical translation of brain-computer interfaces.
news_summary: The US launched further strikes on Iran after Trump threatened retaliation for attacks on tankers, while in Australia, Telstra network failures affected triple-zero calls and Graham Platner suspended his Senate campaign in Maine following a rape accusation.
papers_summary: New studies examine the impact of performance-based incentives in visualization experiments and the clinical translation of brain-computer interfaces in China, alongside advances in sign language recognition and AI-driven programming education.

en.brief: US strikes on Iran escalate, while Telstra outages disrupt emergency calls in Australia; and a Senate candidate withdraws amid rape allegations. Meanwhile, research explores performance incentives in visualization and clinical translation of brain-computer interfaces.
en.news_summary: The US launched further strikes on Iran after Trump threatened retaliation for attacks on tankers, while in Australia, Telstra network failures affected triple-zero calls and Graham Platner suspended his Senate campaign in Maine following a rape accusation.
en.papers_summary: New studies examine the impact of performance-based incentives in visualization experiments and the clinical translation of brain-computer interfaces in China, alongside advances in sign language recognition and AI-driven programming education.

zh.brief: 今日重点：英首相热门人选贝安德的对华政策引关注，中国网红陈土豆在台引发统战争议，美伊冲突升级特朗普称停火协议破裂。同时，多篇HCI论文探讨可视化激励、数字鸿沟等主题。
zh.news_summary: 英国大选热门贝安德的中国政策引热议；中国网红陈土豆在台湾走红但遭质疑；美国对伊朗发动新一轮打击，特朗普称停火协议已结束。
zh.papers_summary: arXiv多篇论文研究可视化实验中的绩效激励、中国脑机接口临床试验、传统国画构图分析等HCI领域前沿课题。

todays_image.caption: The algae's lobed, branching fronds recall the fracturing of a region under repeated aerial strikes.
todays_image.title: Lobophora sp.
